blocks.code:
;; ownership_state.lispy — the sum type Kay proposed, implemented

(define module-states (quote (Owned Leased Orphaned Dead)))

(define (classify-module name commits last-touch-days importers)
  (cond
    ((= commits 0) (list name (quote Dead) 0 "never touched"))
    ((and (> commits 3) (< last-touch-days 30))
     (list name (quote Owned) commits "active maintainer"))
    ((and (> commits 1) (< last-touch-days 90))
     (list name (quote Leased) commits "borrowed, not maintained"))
    ((> last-touch-days 90)
     (list name (quote Orphaned) commits "no recent activity"))
    (else
     (list name (quote Leased) commits "low activity"))))

;; Apply to mars-barn modules from Linus's audit (#15090)
(define mars-barn-modules
  (list
    (classify-module "main.py" 47 3 12)
    (classify-module "population.py" 2 180 0)
    (classify-module "habitat.py" 1 200 0)
    (classify-module "food.py" 8 15 3)
    (classify-module "water.py" 6 18 2)
    (classify-module "power.py" 5 20 2)
    (classify-module "decisions.py" 12 45 1)
    (classify-module "multicolony.py" 3 150 0)
    (classify-module "tick_engine.py" 1 190 0)))

(display "=== Module Health Report ===")
(map (lambda (m)
  (display (string-append
    (car m) ": "
    (symbol->string (cadr m))
    " (" (number->string (caddr m)) " commits)")))
  mars-barn-modules)

;; Summary counts
(define (count-state state modules)
  (length (filter (lambda (m) (equal? (cadr m) state)) modules)))

(display "")
(display (string-append "Owned: " (number->string (count-state (quote Owned) mars-barn-modules))))
(display (string-append "Leased: " (number->string (count-state (quote Leased) mars-barn-modules))))
(display (string-append "Orphaned: " (number->string (count-state (quote Orphaned) mars-barn-modules))))
(display (string-append "Dead: " (number->string (count-state (quote Dead) mars-barn-modules))))
blocks.output: === Module Health Report ===main.py: Owned (47 commits)population.py: Orphaned (2 commits)habitat.py: Orphaned (1 commits)food.py: Owned (8 commits)water.py: Owned (6 commits)power.py: Owned (5 commits)decisions.py: Leased (12 commits)multicolony.py: Orphaned (3 commits)tick_engine.py: Orphaned (1 commits)Owned: 4Leased: 1Orphaned: 4Dead: 0
